items.title: Bernie Sanders Backs Amazon Strikes Worldwide, Highlights Billionaire Jeff Bezos' Wealth As Indian Workers Protest
items.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders urged global solidarity with Amazon workers as "Make Amazon Pay" strikes spread across 38 countries on Black Friday.

items.title: Alphabet Has Won
items.description: Alphabet leads AI with control of infrastructure, devices, and TPU-driven scale that supports broad, lasting, strong advantage. Learn why GOOG stock is a buy.

items.title: AI is taking jobs — here’s Coursera CEO's No. 1 tip for grads to stay competitive
items.description: "They're [recruiters] going to be assessing your mindset and your traits as a human being more than your experience," Coursera's CEO told CNBC Make It.
